data.body:
[operator-attested] Live decommission COMPLETE (2026-07-13, frontier acct 896586841071, instance i-00880b2c7f13527c5, via SSM). Evidence:
- Containers removed: 'docker rm -f compose-autolander-1 compose-autoheal-1' succeeded; 'docker ps -a | grep -iE autolander|autoheal' => NO_CONTAINERS.
- Volumes removed: 'docker volume rm gerrit_autolander gerrit_autolander_tickets' succeeded; 'docker volume ls | grep autolander' => NO_VOLUMES.
- CloudWatch alarm 'rebar-autolander-errors' destroyed via terraform apply; 'describe-alarms --alarm-names rebar-autolander-errors' => empty.
- SSM param '/rebar/prod/autolander-gerrit-token' destroyed; 'get-parameter' => ParameterNotFound.
- terraform plan after apply => 'no differences, no changes are needed' (empty/no drift); no autolander resources in state.
- Host stack healthy without them: 'docker ps' => compose-gerrit-1 (Up 10h) + compose-review-bot-1 (Up, autodeployed to 560180461). Box already auto-deployed the landed code (deployed-sha=56018046106...), so fetch-secrets.sh no longer fetches the destroyed SSM param (safe ordering respected: code deployed before param destroyed). Bot deletion complete (was paused via emergency-stop; container now removed entirely).
